description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with a prominent central dormer and a covered porch extending along one side. The exterior walls are finished in a warm tan color with white trim accentuating the windows, doors, and architectural details. Large windows dominate the front facade, including a multi-pane central window above the main entrance, flanked by smaller windows. The side porch is supported by square columns and has a wooden deck floor. The roof is clad in a light gray material, and the house includes both single and double-hung window styles. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and Craftsman influences, with a focus on symmetry and decorative trim.
description: A tan house with a steep gable roof, white trim, large front windows, and a covered side porch supported by columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large central window, two smaller windows, and the covered porch on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the gable roof, the porch's wooden deck, and the open structure beneath the roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view with a smaller dormer window, a side door, and additional windows, plus the continuation of the porch.
description_view_3: Side view with two upper windows, a side door, and a blue-accented lower window, emphasizing the house's symmetry.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with a large central window and smaller flanking windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with decorative white trim, flanked by windows, and a covered porch supported by square columns
